text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to see and understand images and videos. One common use is image recognition, where software can identify objects or people in a photograph. Object detection goes a step further, not only recognising what is in an image but also locating where it is. This technology has many practical applications. For example, in self-driving cars, computer vision systems use cameras to detect pedestrians, traffic signs, and other vehicles. This helps the car make safe driving decisions in real time.
